steps.title: Identify the temporal marker
steps.content: The passage introduces the second institution with “More recently founded,” explicitly signaling that it was established after the first one. This phrase reveals the passage's organizing principle: ordering institutions by when they were founded.

steps.title: Match the pattern to the choices
steps.content: Following this chronological pattern, the text discusses an older institution first (Museo, 1991), then a more recently founded one (Latino Cultural Center). This exactly describes choice D. The other options impose elements absent from the passage—future plans, trend rejection, definitions, or social arguments. That matches choice D — D is correct.
